content_body:
Looking to experience an amazing cabin trip in Blue Ridge, Georgia? 

Imagine waking up to the gentle sound of a river flowing right outside your door, surrounded by the lush, captivating landscapes of Blue Ridge, GA. Here, where luxury meets the rusticity of the great outdoors, your dream fishing getaway awaits. At Cabin Rentals of Georgia, we offer an exclusive selection of fishing cabins and riverfront cabin rentals that promise not just a vacation, but an experience.

With North Georgia trout fishing right at your fingertips along the Toccoa River, Noontootla Creek, and Fightingtown Creek, embark on a journey to discover your next retreat.


Trout Fishing on Toccoa River

Best Fishing Cabins in Blue Ridge, GA

  • At Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek, the whispers of nature invite relaxation and adventure in equal measure. This haven is not just about the fish you catch but the memories you reel in, surrounded by an environment that’s as inviting as the cabin itself. Boasting a private pond teeming with bass and 1/2 mile of Noontootla Creek boasting trophy-sized rainbow trout that can be fished when accompanied by our trusted fly-fishing guides, Cherokee Sunrise is a magical property offering the fishing experience of a lifetime.

            

  • Creekside Green offers an escape where the water’s melody harmonizes with luxurious comfort. Here, Fightingtown Creek is alive with trout, beckoning anglers to cast their lines in pursuit of the perfect catch, all while indulging in the cabin's amenities that redefine the fishing expedition. During your downtime, enjoy the stone fire pit, hammock, daybed porch swing, and cornhole while making memories both inside and out.

            

  • Serendipity on Noontootla Creek seamlessly blends modern luxury with the timeless allure of nature. It’s a sanctuary for those who seek the thrill of the catch without foregoing the comforts of a premium stay. Situated above the Noontootla Creek, Serendipity boasts 200 feet of trophy trout fishing access and the opportunity for another 1/2 mile of fishing with one of our partnered guides. Boasting 5 King Suites, a game room, Treehouse, and more, Serendipity is your answer for a north Georgia fishing getaway in the lap of luxury.

            

  • Our luxury cabins on the Toccoa River - The Rivers Edge, Riverview Lodge, and Fallen Timber Lodge - are a collective promise of unforgettable moments. Here, the Toccoa River flows through the historic Cherokee Fish Trap, offering abundant fishing adventures right from your doorstep. With a total of 750 feet of river access, reserving one, two, or any combination of these properties is the perfect answer for your family vacation, extended family reunion, guys trip, couples retreat, or corporate retreat.

            

Amenities That Elevate Your Stay

Beyond the allure and easy access to the north Georgia streams and rivers, our Blue Ridge cabins offer amenities that ensure your stay is nothing short of luxurious. From gourmet kitchens perfect for preparing a home-cooked meal to hot tubs where you can unwind under the stars, every detail has been thoughtfully curated for your comfort.


Fallen Timber Lodge - 5 bedroom/5 bath on Toccoa River

Unique to our guests is our partnership with North Georgia Trout Fishing and our friends at Toccoa River Outfitters. These esteemed guides offer personalized fly fishing tours, turning your fishing dreams into reality. Whether you’re a seasoned angler or trying fly fishing for the first time, these guided tours enhance your experience, promising both adventure and the chance to hone your skills in the company of experts. Make sure to ask about this when you reserve one of our Blue Ridge, GA river cabins!


Fishing Guides on Noontootla Creek

Beyond Fishing: Activities for Everyone

While the focus of your North Georgia getaway may be on trout fishing, Blue Ridge is a treasure trove of activities that everyone in your group will enjoy. Explore hiking trails that unveil breathtaking views and waterfalls, wander through the fun shops in downtown Blue Ridge, or indulge in the culinary delights that make this region unique. There’s an adventure waiting for every member of your group. Check out Family Fun Things To Do in Blue Ridge!

Why Choose Our Fishing Cabins in Blue Ridge, GA?

Our cabins are more than just places to stay; they are gateways to experiences. Nestled in prime fishing locations and equipped with luxurious amenities, they offer an unparalleled retreat that is sure to rejuvenate your spirit. Guests praise the seamless blend of adventure and relaxation, a testament to the unforgettable stays we provide.

"My kids and I rented this cabin for a quick getaway. We usually go for the big, glass filled cabin high on the mountain but this time we were looking for something different. From the moment we pulled up it felt like home. Truly. The wildlife, the perfect fluffy grass around the pond and the rich history of the cabin was spectacular. We had the good fortune of meeting the family and they added so much warmth to our trip. Every need we had was far exceeded. The cabin itself is cozy and comfy and the beds are ridiculously soft! Highly recommend Andrew, the fishing guide. He was so good with my kids and I got to relax on the swing while they fished downstream. We will definitely be back!" ~ Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek

"The drive up was on a mostly paved road and not difficult at all. We arrived at a gorgeous cabin with breathtaking views! There was plenty of space and gorgeous views from every balcony. The kitchen was well stocked and made cooking for the group a breeze. The cabin is situated on top of a mountain and the spot on the river is great. Good for fishing, splashing and tubing. Overall, the cabin was big, clean, beautiful, and we had a great time." ~ Riverview Lodge

How to Book Your North Georgia Fishing Getaway

Ready to cast your line into the waters of Blue Ridge, GA? Booking your stay with us is simple. Visit our website, choose your perfect cabin, reserve online with the "Instant Quote" button or with our reservation specialists at (706) 432-2140 and prepare for an adventure that combines the best of fishing with the pinnacle of luxury living. Book directly for the best rates and start planning your getaway today!


The River's Edge - 5 bedroom/3.5 bath luxury cabin rental

At Cabin Rentals of Georgia we understand the magic of a North Georgia fishing getaway. It’s not just about the fish; it’s about the experience, the luxury, and the memories made along the waters of Blue Ridge, GA. With cabins designed to enchant and excite, your next adventure begins here. Cast your line into the future; book your stay and discover the best fishing getaway in Blue Ridge.
title: Reeling in Relaxation: Best Fishing Cabins in Blue Ridge
